tax_filing.title: Making Tax Digital for Corporation Tax (consultation)
tax_filing.summary: HMRC continues development of MTD for Corporation Tax; mandation date deferred beyond 2026.

vat_gst.title: Making Tax Digital for VAT
vat_gst.summary: All VAT-registered businesses must keep digital records and submit returns through MTD-compatible software.

e_invoicing.title: UK e-invoicing consultation
e_invoicing.summary: HMRC and DBT consultation on standardised e-invoicing in the UK.

payroll.title: PAYE Real Time Information (RTI)
payroll.summary: Employers must report PAYE in real time on or before each payday via FPS submissions.

local_gaap.title: FRS 102 periodic review (effective 2026)
local_gaap.summary: Major amendments to FRS 102 — new lease accounting and revenue recognition models — apply to periods beginning on or after 1 January 2026.

banking_payments.title: Variable Recurring Payments (cVRP) rollout
banking_payments.summary: JROC roadmap for commercial Variable Recurring Payments under Open Banking framework.
